text: I truly believe there now needs to be more endometriosis centres across the country to meet the demand
My mri they said it was completely normal and it was extremely disheartening
6 months post op. still in loads of pain...whyyy!

the surgeons in newham literally told me they won’t operate on me because the scans show nothing and they’d hate to waste their time on something that isn’t there. i was diagnosed literally in april, the endo is behind my liver. if you feel that somethings wrong, keep pushing!!!
Got diagnosed with adeno after ultrasound and now waiting for my MRI to exclude endo… I don’t know what to expect and what to hope for anymore 🥹🥹
I think we need to know who to go to in our area via NHS

I had endo surgery just over a year ago, I was told they found lesions and removed them, I was still in pain that seemed to get worse and worse, had an ultrasound a couple of weeks ago and they found an 8cm Dermoid cyst on my ovary and several calcified cysts all over my ovaries that were blatantly missed or just ignored. I feel so broken by a system that just does not seem to care
See this seems to be my problem, surgery by people who aren’t experts 😭

They said my mri show cervix ehrn I was removed I had two surgeries one endometriosis removed it and one after nerve damage, tech kept saying it was cervix my wonderful gp as like I’m calling prior surgeron got on phone with tech said reading this wrong look again turns out it was scar tissue

Iv been ignored over and over while they miss things. I had a team of gynaecologist around my bed 4 of them all reading the same mri. But yet all 4 came up with different findings and none of them were the same like all the answers were different 1 said it was in my uterus and don’t have endo were 2 others said no it’s she has it inside and out and it’s spreading another said no it’s just serface endo . Iv been told this last op they would be removing a lot of it they left it all in there I’m battling with them and getting no were I have all medical records with there findings over the years but no treatment. These illnesses do not stop they grown and grown and grown but yet they say mine hasn’t they don’t know what there doin

But yet won’t refer me to the rite specialist. They say they will do I don’t trust them . Never have they followed up anything after there findings. And say scans and mri are normal . I don’t believe they have a clue what there doin . I’m struggling to even now how to sue them or get a second opinion. Everything scan and test they do is normally but I’m riddled makes no sense

Been diagnosed since 2003 with endo adeno and pso for over 26 years iv had 7 surgeries but yet never treated just diagnosed. I believe it’s rite up in my chest as I have symptoms of this they refuse to send me specialist with all there finding and send me on my way . I have just had surgery on 2nd of may believing I was getting but they removed nothing but say it a server complex case but they will now remove my womb and uterus . They say it’s solves everything . Endo is in my body has been since 12 years old I’m now 44 . I get told it not real it’s in my head it can’t be that painful. I have bleed now sold 2 years due to fybroids . I have stomach issues bowl issues chest problems pain in back on chest in legs . I feel I’m in labour all day every day . No pain killer work I been describe so many different ones and all it’s done is give me oesophageal polyps as well as stomach ulcers since 1016 due to all meds killing my stomach off . I can feel stomach and bowl stuck together but yet mri says it’s not there blood are normals all are normal scans are normal but the findings after surgery are so bad it everywhere. Iv only just been told iv never been treated . I was admitted after surgery as they made things worse as they just irritated all my diseases. I suffer chronic pain daily . I told them I want to be referred or I will sue the hospital. They won’t refer me but yet now after 15 years of fighting have they agreed for hysterectomy with gyny now

they found my endo on several ultrasounds as well as on the MRI it was HUGE i had surgery in the beginning of march they did a laparotomy and even had to remove my appendix cuz it spread to there they game ne some pills that i need to take everyday and they told me i probably wont be getting my periods anymore but i have been bleeding lik on and off all the time for the past 2 months (id bleed for 4 days then stop for 2 then again for 3 and so on and on) and i gen dk what to do and sadly i am still in pain like most of the time idk what to do
